name: Siddharth K.
bio: Dedicated to building an inclusive and progressive campus environment at GEC Palakkad.
responsibilities: Representing students in college senate and official administrative bodies
Overseeing overall planning of campus events and student support services
vision: To establish GEC Palakkad as a hub of academic excellence, creative freedom, and active student-welfare initiatives.

name: Anjana Nair
bio: Passionate about advocacy, equality, and developing leadership skills among female engineering students.
responsibilities: Assisting the chairperson in overall governance
Directing activities for women empowerment and representing student concerns
vision: Ensuring gender equality, active participation of female students in co-curricular fields, and a safer campus space for all.

name: Adithyan P.
bio: Committed to organized execution of union decisions and bridging communication between college authority and the students.
responsibilities: Managing minutes and documentation of union assemblies
Co-ordinating union budget and official communications
Organizing the annual arts and sports festivals
vision: Streamlining administrative processes for student activities and introducing digital channels for student transparency.

name: Gautham Krishna
bio: Representing the interests of computer science students and promoting technical innovation.
responsibilities: Gathering academic feedback and representing CSE student needs to the union
Organizing departmental workshops and open-source hackathons
vision: Creating more industry-exposure opportunities and fostering a vibrant programming culture.

name: Sneha Rajesh
bio: Enthusiastic representative focusing on electronics hands-on workshops and academic support.
responsibilities: Expressing concerns of ECE students in union meetings
Coordinating peer-to-peer tutoring for difficult core subjects
vision: Enhancing lab facilities awareness and encouraging active participation in technical symposia.
